title: tillandsia brevilingua
intro: Tillandsia brevilingua is a type of epiphytic air plant that belongs to the Bromeliad family. Traditionally used in folk medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Tillandsia brevilingua include its potential to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Tillandsia brevilingua can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in tinctures or capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
